ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the educational resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., lecture, quiz, video) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was created */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site or department that created the resource */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the resource */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the resource */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publisher ("publisher_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related resource */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "option_a" TEXT /* Option A for multiple-choice questions */,
  "option_b" TEXT /* Option B for multiple-choice questions */,
  "option_c" TEXT /* Option C for multiple-choice questions */,
  "option_d" TEXT /* Option D for multiple-choice questions */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer option (a, b, c, d) */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation of the correct answer */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple-choice, open-ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, educator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the resource was accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_access_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being analyzed */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been accessed */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the resource */,
  "average_completion_time" REAL /* Average time taken by users to complete the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site or department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site or department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being commented on */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the user's feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_categories_rel" (
  "resource_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-category mapping */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the resource */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the category was assigned to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_categories_rel_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_categories_rel_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES resource_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publisher" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_publishers" (
  "resource_publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-publisher mapping */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher assigned to the resource */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_publishers_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_publishers_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publisher ("publisher_id")
)
